OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Sep-18-2019 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-18-2019 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT AUTOLOTTO, INC.'s DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.

Defendant Autolotto, Inc.'s demurrer to complaint is overruled. The fraud cause of action is alleged with sufficient particularity. Plaintiff alleges that it was duped into entering into the promissory notes because Defendant misrepresented that Beth Bresnahan (former director of Massachusetts lottery) and Joey Krup (manager of Pantera Fund) were advisors to Defendant. The complaint alleges that the misrepresentations were on defendant's website and its online "White Paper." The complaint even attaches actual copies of the alleged misrepresentations. The Court fails to see what further facts need to be alleged to support the claim. (See West v. JPMorgan Chase Bank, NA (2013) 214 Cal.App.4th 780, 793 [plaintiff met specificity requirement where she alleged where and when defendant made misrepresentations, including in documents attached to the complaint].) Lastly, whether the misrepresentations are actually material raises a factual issue.

A proposed order is submitted by email. Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
